description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, founded around 1911 by Salvatore Sabella. It operates throughout the Greater Philadelphia metropolitan area and South Jersey, known for violence and internal conflicts. The family experienced a peaceful era under Angelo Bruno (1959-1980) before a series of violent successions and wars. Currently active, with membership estimated at 50 made members and 100 associates as of 2004.

country_links.evidence_quote: the criminal organization operates throughout the Greater Philadelphia metropolitan area, including South Jersey
country_links.context: The organization operates throughout the Philadelphia metropolitan area, South Jersey, and other U.S. locations.
